failures.detail: Applying a UNIFORM 3/5 cloture rule to all cloture votes reconstructs only ~0.77 of real outcomes — WORSE than majority-only (0.95) — because the nuclear option (2013/2017) made cloture on NOMINATIONS a simple majority. As-of + matter-type versioning recovers 0.96. Preserved: naive rule application can hurt.

The agency/queue/election/moderation FAMILIES are executable, but no template-specific official evidence was core-verified this run, so no evidence-backed TEMPLATE exists for them — they select at Tier 3 (structural) with rule uncertainty. Honest gap, not faked.

The Rule of Four is a COUNT (4 of 9), an informal custom; it is stored as evidence but the decision engine's fraction-of-present threshold does not natively execute a fixed count. SCOTUS cert stays `executable` (informal), not historically replayed.
